onboardingAllowlistBody.message: Edit the domains that should stay available during a session. Focus Dolphin adds friction to sites outside this list.

onboardingCloseHint.message: You won't need to keep this page open.

onboardingCompleteSetupBody.message: Focus Dolphin is ready. Start a session from the popup whenever you choose.

onboardingCompleteStartedBody.message: Your 25-minute session is running. Open the Focus Dolphin popup any time to check the remaining time.

onboardingCompletionSaveWarning.message: Your session started, but we couldn't save onboarding completion. You can still close this tab and use the popup.

onboardingDomainsHint.message: Enter one domain per line. Pasted links are cleaned automatically.

onboardingEmergencyNote.message: Hard sessions include a delayed emergency exit: after confirmation, the session ends in 5 minutes. You can use it once per week.

onboardingFinishError.message: We couldn't save onboarding completion. Please try again.

onboardingHardBody.message: Keep listed sites blocked for the full session.

onboardingHardAllowlistBody.message: Keep sites outside this allowance blocked for the full session.

onboardingLoadErrorBody.message: Reload this tab to try again. Your existing settings were not changed.

onboardingIntensityBody.message: This choice applies only to the first 25-minute session. Focus Dolphin never raises it automatically.

onboardingIntensityTitle.message: Choose how much friction you want

onboardingIntroBody.message: Focus Dolphin adds a thoughtful pause before distracting sites and helps you protect the focus time you choose.

onboardingIntroPetBody.message: Completed sessions add to your dolphin's growth. On rest days, your progress stays right where it is.

onboardingIntroPrivacyBody.message: Focus Dolphin has no backend. Sessions and optional history analysis stay on this device; synced preferences may use your browser's sync service.

onboardingIntroPrivacyTitle.message: Your browsing stays on this device

onboardingIntroDataBody.message: To apply your rules, Focus Dolphin checks the current site's address. A blocked return keeps only the web origin and path after removing credentials, queries, and fragments. Session history, focus totals, domain-level blocked attempts, and any medium-mode reason you enter are stored locally. Optional 30-day history access is requested only when you start analysis; raw URLs are transient and only domain summaries are saved. Language, settings, lists, schedules, and dolphin progress may use browser sync. Nothing is sent to the developer, and page text, forms, passwords, and messages are never read.

onboardingListBody.message: Edit the domains Focus Dolphin should add friction to during a session. You can change them later in Settings.

onboardingListSaveError.message: We couldn't save the focus list. Please try again.

onboardingMediumBody.message: Wait briefly and state your reason before continuing.

onboardingSoftBody.message: Pause briefly, then continue if you still choose to.

onboardingStartError.message: We couldn't start the session. Your setup is still here, so you can try again.
